current.h1: Structured data infrastructure for Stellar and Soroban.
current.lead: Obsrvr turns raw ledger data into the clean, queryable, audit-ready data products that wallets, protocols, and compliance teams build on.
current.label: 0 · Current — "Structured data infrastructure…"

ship.h1: Ship on Stellar without building the data layer.
ship.lead: Obsrvr gives developer teams decoded transactions, structured tables, and production APIs from day one — so you build the product, not the pipeline.
ship.label: 1 · Ship on Stellar without building the data layer.

decoded.h1: Every Stellar transaction, decoded and ready to build on.
decoded.lead: Raw XDR becomes readable transfers, swaps, and contract events. Wallets, protocols, and compliance teams all read from the same canonical layer.
decoded.label: 2 · Every Stellar transaction, decoded…

platform.h1: The data platform for teams building on Stellar.
platform.lead: One platform — structured data, interpretation APIs, and compliance tooling — that every team on Stellar can build on.
platform.label: 3 · The data platform for teams building on Stellar.

production.lead: Obsrvr ingests every ledger, decodes every Soroban event, and delivers the canonical tables and APIs that wallets, protocols, and compliance teams run in production.
production.label: 4 · Turn Stellar into production-grade data.

audit.h1: Audit-ready Stellar data, from ingestion to answer.
audit.lead: Obsrvr turns raw ledger data into the clean, queryable, audit-ready data products that wallets, protocols, and compliance teams build on.
audit.label: 5 · Audit-ready Stellar data, from ingestion to answer.
